data.body: Delete: src/lib/openrouter.ts, src/lib/openrouter-session-runtime.ts, src/bin/openrouter-agent.ts, src/bin/__tests__/openrouter-agent.test.ts, src/lib/__tests__/openrouter.test.ts, src/lib/__tests__/openrouter-integration.test.ts. Assess src/lib/keychain.ts — if only used for OpenRouter API key, delete it and its test.
data.title: Delete OpenRouter files and clean up keychain
